mainDecision: Assess timing for a growth-oriented external step with adjacent role logic.
optionsUnderConsideration: Single-path staged transition with validation gates.
marketDemandReason: Adjacent market demand remains healthy and role demand is broad.
sponsorSupport: Yes – at least one strong sponsor
commitmentStyle: I commit gradually but can change direction if needed.
stayScenario12to18m: Sustained growth with optional transition windows.
planBStrength: I have a clear Plan B and strong financial/career safety nets.
mustAnswerQuestion: When does commitment become structurally defensible?
